sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35400" key="e)neo/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεόφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n35400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stupid,</tr_> prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1557.tlg001:12:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Panyas.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
